name: The Windows Firewall Driver failed to start
definition: Windows Security Event ID 5035 records The Windows Firewall Driver failed to start.
trigger_scenarios: Windows logs the event when the audited security operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: Driver failure with error code 0xC0000001 or recurring timeout=60 seconds can disable filtering before logon; investigate service and driver image integrity.
The initiating account and Logon ID support attribution and correlation to 4624 and 4688.
The affected host determines the operational impact.

false_positives: Documented maintenance, policy changes, or approved administration can generate this event.
Validate change control and host role before suppressing.

attck_mapping.technique_name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify System Firewall

detection_notes: Driver failure with error code 0xC0000001 or recurring timeout=60 seconds can disable filtering before logon; investigate service and driver image integrity. This is a T1562.004 Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify System Firewall signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the actor, process, and related events.
kql_snippet:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 5035
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account
